plugins.name: cadence
plugins.description: Opinionated, gated workflow for solo development with Claude: conversate, brainstorm, refine, spec, sprint-plan, work, and review tickets on a file-based board, plus independent debugging and code review, with a persistent, Obsidian-linked knowledge brain.
